Looking at the class diagram, `MermaidValidationPipeline` has a composition relationship with `QualityValidator` (via `MermaidValidationPipeline *-- QualityValidator`), and the call graph snippet is truncated at 375 edges with only ~50 shown.

From the class definition, `MermaidValidationPipeline` has methods `validate` and `validateFull` that orchestrate the pipeline validators. The call graph shows calls from `MermaidDiagramGenerator_generateOnly` to `MermaidValidationPipeline_validateFull` and `MermaidValidationPipeline_validate`, but the internal calls from `MermaidValidationPipeline` methods to `QualityValidator` methods are in the truncated portion ("... and 325 more call edges").

The visible call graph does not explicitly show any `MermaidValidationPipeline_*` → `QualityValidator_*` edges.
